name: Debt Relief Legal Clinic
description_short: San Diego bankruptcy law firm with 35+ years of experience guiding clients through Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, with a free initial consultation.
description_long:
Debt Relief Legal Clinic is a San Diego-based bankruptcy law firm with more than 35 years of experience representing debtors in the U.S. Bankruptcy Court for the Southern District of California. The firm focuses exclusively on consumer bankruptcy, serving individuals and families throughout San Diego County who are overwhelmed by debt, facing foreclosure, or dealing with creditor harassment. Their deep familiarity with local court procedures, filing requirements, and California-specific exemptions sets them apart from generalist attorneys who handle bankruptcy as a secondary practice area.

The firm handles both Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 bankruptcy cases. Chapter 7 involves asset liquidation to discharge debts quickly, while Chapter 13 creates a structured repayment plan over three to five years, allowing clients to retain assets. Beyond the filings themselves, the firm helps clients obtain an automatic stay—a court order that immediately halts foreclosure proceedings, creditor collection calls, wage garnishments, vehicle repossession, and judgment liens. They also guide clients through mandatory pre-filing requirements such as credit counseling courses and the meeting of creditors at the federal building in downtown San Diego.

What distinguishes Debt Relief Legal Clinic is their knowledge of California-specific bankruptcy rules, including the state's expanded homestead exemption, which may allow clients to protect their home equity during bankruptcy. They conduct detailed financial assessments to determine which chapter is most suitable for each client, prepare all paperwork, and represent clients at court appearances. The firm also extends support beyond the filing itself, offering guidance on rebuilding credit and financial stability after discharge.

This is a legitimate, experienced law firm for San Diego residents with serious debt problems. However, the website does not disclose attorney fees or typical cost ranges, which is a meaningful gap for consumers trying to budget. Geographic coverage is limited to the Southern District of California, so it is not an option for people outside the San Diego area. The website also provides no client testimonials, case results, or bar association credentials to independently verify the claimed 35+ years of experience. Consumers should request a clear fee quote during the free consultation before proceeding.
address: 46 3rd Ave ste d, Chula Vista, CA 91910

company_info.headquarters: 46 3rd Ave ste d, Chula Vista, CA 91910

pros: 35+ years of bankruptcy-specific legal experience in San Diego
Free initial consultation to assess eligibility and options
Handles both Chapter 7 (liquidation) and Chapter 13 (repayment plan) cases
Deep knowledge of local San Diego bankruptcy court procedures and filing requirements
Familiar with California-specific exemptions including the expanded homestead exemption
Provides post-bankruptcy credit rebuilding guidance, not just the filing itself
Obtains automatic stays to immediately halt foreclosure, repossession, and creditor harassment
cons: Attorney fees and cost ranges are not disclosed anywhere on the website
Geographic coverage limited to San Diego County and the Southern District of California only
No client reviews, testimonials, or verifiable case outcomes published on the site
The bankruptcy costs and fees section of the website appears incomplete in available content
No information on attorney credentials, bar admission dates, or individual attorney profiles
best_for: San Diego County residents facing imminent foreclosure who need an automatic stay quickly
Individuals with significant unsecured debt (credit cards, medical bills) considering Chapter 7 discharge
Homeowners who want to keep their property and need Chapter 13 repayment plan guidance
People experiencing active creditor harassment, wage garnishment, or vehicle repossession threats
diagnosis: Debt Relief Legal Clinic is best suited for San Diego residents who have exhausted other debt relief options and need experienced legal representation for a Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing, particularly those facing immediate foreclosure or aggressive creditor action. The main caveat is that this is a geographically restricted, legal-fee-based service—consumers outside San Diego County cannot use it, and those on tight budgets should get a clear fee quote upfront since costs are not published on the website.
services: Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and repayment plan structuring
Automatic stay petitions to halt foreclosure and collections
Creditor harassment and collection call cessation
Vehicle repossession prevention via bankruptcy filing
Financial assessment and bankruptcy eligibility review
Credit counseling course guidance (mandatory pre-filing requirement)
Meeting of creditors preparation and attendance
California exemption planning (homestead, vehicle, personal property)
